The PR adds a Bedrock-backed Claude PR review workflow and also carries broad unrelated workflow, release/version, package/lockfile, diagnostics/runtime, plugin, and docs changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection of the PR head shows the floating privileged action, release/dependency graph changes, and deleted Testbox workflows. No runtime bug reproduction is applicable because this is CI infrastructure.
